# FlaxseedsPro Documentation — LLM Reference Guide

> Comprehensive technical knowledge base for FlaxseedsPro premium flaxseed products, processing equipment, quality standards, and industry expertise.

## Key URLs

- Homepage: https://flaxseedspro.com/
- Products Overview: https://flaxseedspro.com/products/
- Technical Specifications: https://flaxseedspro.com/technical-documents/
- Quality Control Protocols: https://flaxseedspro.com/technical-documents/quality-control-protocols/
- Processing Standards: https://flaxseedspro.com/technical-documents/processing-standards/
- Glossary: https://flaxseedspro.com/glossary/
- FAQ: https://flaxseedspro.com/faq/
- Certificates: https://flaxseedspro.com/certificates/

## About FlaxseedsPro

FlaxseedsPro is a leading B2B supplier of premium flaxseed products based in [Location]. We specialize in whole flaxseeds (brown and golden), milled flaxseed meal, cold-pressed flaxseed oil, organic flaxseeds, and flaxseed protein powder. Our facility is HACCP, ISO 22000, and organic certified.

## Product Categories

### Whole Flaxseeds
- **Brown Flaxseeds**: Rich in ALA omega-3 (52-57% ALA content), high lignan content
- **Golden Flaxseeds**: Milder flavor, lighter color, identical nutritional profile
- **Organic**: Certified organic, non-GMO verified

### Processed Products
- **Milled Flaxseed Meal**: Freshly ground, stabilized for shelf life
- **Cold-Pressed Flaxseed Oil**: Low-temperature extraction, nitrogen-flushed packaging
- **Flaxseed Protein Powder**: 40-50% protein content, ideal for plant-based formulations

## Key Technical Specifications

- ALA Omega-3 Content: 52-57% of total fatty acids
- Dietary Fiber: 27-28% (soluble + insoluble)
- Lignans (SDG): 7-10 mg/g
- Protein: 18-24%
- Moisture: < 8%
- Purity: 99.9% (minimal foreign material)
- Microbiological: Standard plate count < 10,000 CFU/g
- Storage: Cool, dry conditions (< 25°C, < 60% RH)
- Shelf Life: 12 months (whole), 6-9 months (milled), 18 months (oil)

## Processing Capabilities

- Mechanical cleaning and optical sorting
- Mechanical dehulling
- Low-temperature hammer milling
- Cold press extraction (below 40°C)
- Nitrogen-flushed packaging
- Aseptic filling for oil products
- Full metal detection and X-ray inspection

## Certifications

- HACCP Certified
- ISO 22000:2018 Food Safety Management
- Organic Certification (EU/USDA)
- Non-GMO Project Verified
- Kosher Certified
- Gluten-Free Certified
- FSSC 22000

## Equipment Technologies

Facility equipment includes: gravity separators, optical sorters, hammer mills, cold screw presses, plate filters, rotary dryers, nitrogen flush packaging lines, and in-line quality monitoring.
